# Ore no Imouto ga Konnani Kawaii Wake ga Nai. Happy End

name: Unlimited Shots
mode: once
w32 0032C3A8 39290000

name: Unlimited Time
mode: once
w32 00345DBC 60000000

name: No Camera Zooming Or Angle Restraints
mode: once
w32 0032AC90 D03F1DF0
w32 0032AD14 60000000
w32 0032AD2C 60000000
w32 0034BEB8 60000000
w32 0034BEC0 60000000
w32 0034BEC8 60000000
w32 0034BED0 60000000
w32 0034BED8 60000000
w32 0034BEE0 60000000

name: Max Bonus
mode: once
w32 00348FF0 7C085214

name: AoB Unlimited Shots
mode: once
aob 3929FFFF913F07BC4BFFFED87BDD0020 39290000913F07BC4BFFFED87BDD0020

name: AoB Unlimited Time
mode: once
aob 7FA0E850FBB607984873BCBDE8410028 60000000FBB607984873BCBDE8410028

name: AoB No Camera Zooming Or Angle Restraints
mode: once
aob D01F1DD8C1AB0000C19F1DE4C17F1DE8 60000000C1AB0000C19F1DE4C17F1DE8
aob D1BF1DDCC0090000D18103A0D16103A4 60000000C0090000D18103A0D16103A4

aob 419C0048FF824800419C002438000000 60000000FF8248006000000038000000
